content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to rank intrinsic curiosity rewards (from ICM and RND methods) by the long-term downstream learning utility of the unexpected experience, rather than just rewarding prediction error itself. This creates a curious active agent that only stores high-impact surprising experiences that accelerate future task learning, avoiding the common 'noise overfitting' problem that plagues current curiosity-driven RL agents.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
